title: Angular Firebase
content:
I created a Firebase project using https://console.firebase.google.com ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-5.02.39-pm-1836x1011.png) *I named the project haddley-firebase* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-5.03.04-pm-1836x1009.png) *I disabled Google Analytics* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-5.05.06-pm-1836x1001.png) *I waited for the project to be created* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-5.05.38-pm-1836x1011.png) *The Firebase project was created* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-5.07.10-pm-832x520.png) *I selected the Web option* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-5.10.13-pm-1836x1013.png) *I entered an app nickname* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-5.11.10-pm-1836x1006.png) *I reviewed the Firebase SDK configuration* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-5.14.03-pm-1836x921.png) *I navigated to the Firebase project dashboard* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-5.14.57-pm-1836x729.png) *I clicked Get started* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-5.15.48-pm-1836x842.png) *I selected Email/Password authentication* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-5.17.21-pm-1836x892.png) *I enabled Email/Password authentication* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-5.18.19-pm-1836x769.png) *esp8266* ## Creating a new angular project I installed the Angular command line interface using [npm](/posts/npm/) ```bash % npm i -g @angular/cli ``` I created a new Angular project using "ng new" ```bash % ng new haddley-angular ``` ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-5.19.35-pm-1836x983.png) *I ran ng new haddley-angular* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-5.22.07-pm-1836x965.png) *I ran npm start* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-5.23.19-pm-1836x643.png) *The app was running at http://localhost:4200* ## angular fire https://www.npmjs.com/package/@angular/fire ```bash npm i @angular/fire ``` ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-5.27.16-pm-1366x614.png) *I installed @angular/fire* ## environments I added firebaseConfig to environments.ts ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-8.24.03-pm-1836x551.png) *I updated environments.ts* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-8.43.55-pm-1836x773.png) *I added provideFirebaseApp, provideFirestore, provideAuth and ReactiveFormsModule to app.module.ts* ## login, register and dashboard components ```bash ng generate component login ng generate component register ng generate component dashboard ``` ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-8.34.16-pm-1836x520.png) *I generated the login, register and dashboard components* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-8.36.08-pm-1836x314.png) *I removed the sample html from app.component.html* ## bootstrap 5 I used Bootstrap for styling the forms. ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-8.39.03-pm-1836x563.png) *I added the CSS stylesheet link* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-8.40.07-pm-1836x483.png) *The CSS stylesheet link was added* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-8.41.32-pm-1836x803.png) *I reviewed an example form* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-9.01.00-pm-1836x647.png) *I updated register.component.html* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-9.53.35-pm-1836x708.png) *I updated login.component.html* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-26-at-11.09.01-am-1836x270.png) *I updated dashboard.component.html* ## Route I configured Angular routing. ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-26-at-11.26.53-am-1836x589.png) *I created authguard.ts* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-26-at-11.27.17-am-1836x621.png) *I configured app-routing.module.ts* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-9.57.46-pm-1836x580.png) *Firebase had no users yet* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-9.58.10-pm-1836x583.png) *I navigated to /register* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-9.58.23-pm-1836x591.png) *Firebase showed the registered users* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-25-at-9.58.38-pm-1836x540.png) *I navigated to /login* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-26-at-11.10.48-am-1836x613.png) *I navigated to /dashboard* ## ng deploy I used "ng deploy" to deploy the app. ```bash % ng deploy ``` ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-26-at-11.55.42-am-1720x870.png) *I ran ng deploy* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-26-at-11.56.01-am-1836x1011.png) *The app was live at https://haddley-firebase-e8e21.web.app* ## Saving and retrieving private message documents I used addDoc and query collection to save and retrieve messages. ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-27-at-11.08.21-am-1836x476.png) *I updated the Firestore rules* ![](assets/images/angularfirebase/screen-shot-2023-04-27-at-11.08.59-am-1298x808.png) *I viewed the dashboard* ## dashboard.component.ts ```typescript import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core'; import { Auth } from '@angular/fire/auth'; @Component({ selector: 'app-dashboard', templateUrl: './dashboard.component.html', styleUrls: ['./dashboard.component.scss'] }) export class DashboardComponent implements OnInit { user = this.auth.currentUser; constructor(private auth: Auth) { } ngOnInit(): void { console.log(this.auth.currentUser); } } ``` ## dashboard.component.html ```html

dashboard works!

…(truncated)
